name: GOLFTEC Tyvola
about: GOLFTEC Tyvola is a golf training facility focused on data-driven instruction using advanced technology. The venue offers personalized coaching and custom club fitting services utilizing launch monitors, high-speed video analysis, and OPTIMOTION motion tracking to improve player performance. GOLFTEC provides a structured learning environment with coaches who create personalized game plans, and offers practice memberships for access to training bays. The facility also has a pro shop for purchasing golf equipment and apparel.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors provides detailed swing analysis
Personalized coaching with data-driven lesson plans for targeted improvement
Custom club fitting with launch monitor data to match equipment to player's swing

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available
No information on alcohol service available

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned in the privacy policy as a product offered by GOLFTEC ST LLC D/B/A SKYTRAK

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment for lessons and fittings. However, you are welcome to bring your own clubs if you prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no information available regarding outside food and drink policies. It's recommended to contact the center directly for specific details.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on lessons and practice rather than full 18-hole simulation. A typical lesson or practice session duration would need to be confirmed directly with the center.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and mentions using technology to help juniors see and understand their progress, making it suitable for young golfers.
